title: pereskiopsis chapistle
side_effects: Pereskiopsis chapistle can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory problems in some individuals. In rare cases, consuming large quantities of the plant can lead to more severe complications, such as liver damage and kidney failure. Additionally, using the plant for medicinal purposes without proper knowledge and guidance can result in interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional or a qualified expert before using Pereskiopsis chapistle for any health-related purposes.
